description: Test vectors for lichen_hash_32 FNV-1a32 primitive (basis=0x811c9dc5, for each byte h=(h^b)*0x01000193 mod 2^32). Used for TDMA slots, CCP channel/hop/load_factor selection per spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md §2a.3 and test/vectors/ccp*.json. Matches Rust lichen-core::lichen_hash_32, Python _hash_32 exactly. IID now uses independent SHA-256 (project-LICHEN-iqxx). Independent oracle. All impls MUST match.
